global.description: The ad features a dark background with abstract shapes and clear messaging about cashback offers.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to earn cashback with a simple signup process.

elements.label: dark background
elements.description: A solid dark background that fills the entire canvas, providing contrast for the foreground elements.

elements.label: EarnPath logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'EarnPath' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top left.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small circular badge with the text 'UGC' in a clean font, located near the top left corner.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: A composition of abstract geometric shapes, including a large rectangle and a circle, centered in the ad.

elements.label: additional shapes
elements.description: Another set of abstract shapes, slightly smaller and overlapping with the first set, adding depth to the design.

elements.label: large shape
elements.description: A prominent large rectangle that serves as a focal point, positioned centrally within the ad.

elements.label: small shape
elements.description: A small, irregular shape located towards the bottom center of the ad, adding visual interest.

elements.label: cashback message
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Earn cashback daily' with a smaller tagline 'Fast signup, instant card' below it, centered at the bottom.
elements.text_content: Earn cashback daily Fast signup, instant card

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Shop now' in a clear, inviting font, positioned below the cashback message.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, minimalist with bold text, cashback offer, abstract shapes
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo and UGC label are at the top, abstract shapes are centered, and the cashback message and CTA are at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Earn cashback daily, Fast signup, instant card, Shop now, EarnPath, UGC
